calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Formal Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Formal Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Continued To Jun-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alyssa Dattio appeared via zoom for Jon Vigna (petitioner).
Camille Collarusso appeared via zoom (pro per).

Counsel requested a continuance to file the accounting, and that she is waiting for a related matter to be resolved. The matter is continued to June 02, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: A. Datt; Deputy: Not reported (D204).

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Formal Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Apr-28-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vincent Yu for executor Jon Vigna (via Zoom).
Asher Anderson for interested parties Jonthan Knott and Raymond Smith (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status of Formal Accounting.

The Court inquired regarding the status of the filing of an accounting. Mr. Yu reported that a trial date has been set for January 12, 2026 in the related Gaetano (Thomas) Iveli Revocable Trust, and that a Petition to Determine Spousal Interest of Surviving Spouse in the other related matter, Estate of Thomas Iveli, is set for hearing on April 14, 2026. Mr. Yu stated that resolution of those matters is necessary before a formal accounting can be prepared.

The Court continued the matter to April 28, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-09-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vincent Yu for Jon Vigna, Executor (via Zoom).
Asher Anderson for Raymond Smith and Jonathan Knott, Interested Parties (via Zoom).
Camille Colarusso, Interested Party (via Zoom).

Mr. Yu confirmed that a partial and preliminary inventory and appraisal was filed on July 7, 2025, reflecting only undisputed cash assets.

Mr. Yu noted that a corporate interest remains unappraised due to its entanglement with the ongoing administration of the Iveli estate. The probate referee declined to appraise that asset pending resolution in the related estate. Final tax returns and accountings are still due.

In light of the partial filing and pending related proceedings, the Court took both the petition for approval of status of administration and the status hearing on inventory and appraisal off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Continued To Jul-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vincent Yu appeared via zoom for Jon Vigna (petitioner).
Camille Colarusso appeared via zoom (pro per).

Mr. Yu stated that it was an oversight on his part for not filing the inventory and appraisal, that he would file it by the end of the week, that they are still working on closing the Thomas Iveli matter, and that been having issues several properties being returned to the lender.

Ma. Colarusso stated that she is waiting for a return call from Mr. Yu's office to give her an update of the three properties that they have to give back to the lenders. Mr. Yu stated that Ms. Robello followed with an email to Ms. Colarusso.

The matter is continued to July 9, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Status on Inventory and Appraisal is set for July 9, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Petition for Formal Accounting is set for January 7, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Continued To Jun-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vincent Yu for Jon Vigna, Executor (via Zoom).
Camille Colarusso, Interested Party/Creditor in Pro Per (via Zoom).

The court requested that Mr. Yu file a partial inventory and appraisal as soon as possible. Mr. Yu indicated that a partial inventory and appraisal could be filed reflecting the amount received after the conservatorship was closed.

Mr. Yu requested deferral of a formal accounting for one year, citing unresolved issues in the related Estate of Thomas Iveli matter. Camille Colarusso objected to further delays and expressed frustration with prolonged administration of estates. The court instructed Ms. Colarusso and Mr. Yu to discuss property-specific issues outside of the courtroom.

The court opted to continue the matter for six months to June 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow progress on the unresolved issues and for Mr. Yu to file a partial inventory and appraisal.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Continued To Jan-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Continued To Dec-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-13-2024 Continued To Sep-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Vincent Yu appearing via zoom for Joh Vigna (petitioner).
Camille Colorusso (pro per) appearing via zoom.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentar. The lost will dated December 06, 2002 is admitted to probate. John Vigna is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Chavez. Not reported.
